intentSynonyms: make a new conversation in gemini
open a new conversation in gemini
start a new gemini conversation in gemini
description: Create a new Gemini conversation by sending an initial message. Returns the new conversation ID, response ID, and the AI response text. Use the returned conversation_id, response_id, and response_choice_id with send_message to continue the conversation.

text.description: Initial message text to start the conversation

model_id.description: Model ID to use (from list_models). Defaults to the active model.
